description: Creates a probability distribution table from a PMF or binomial chart. Shows X values and P(X=x) in tabular form. Optionally adds computation columns for E(X) and Var(X) with a sum row.

arguments.name: chart
arguments.description: Reference to a PMF or binomial chart

arguments.name: columns
arguments.description: Optional computation columns: col(xp) for x*P(x) (E(X)), col(x2p) for x^2*P(x) (Var(X))

examples.expression:
S = sspace(dice(2), at(4,10), view(12,12))
P = pmf(S, sum, at(4,24), view(10,10))
PDT = pdtable(P, at(18,10))

examples.scenario: With both E(X) and Var(X) columns

examples.expression:
B = binomial(10, 0.5, at(4,10), view(10,10))
PDT = pdtable(B, at(18,10), col(xp))
